productName: Stingers - 5pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Skunk Cookies - 2.5g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Skunk Cookies, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a pungent, classic skunk flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
